description: Baseline SEO audit setup; deterministic audit found 8 technical SEO findings, but check-site-meta smoke hung past timeout.

asi.hypothesis: Establish a measurable SEO proxy using a deterministic local audit plus npx check-site-meta readiness smoke.
asi.finding: Baseline has missing branded descriptions in all locales except page metadata, no root hreflang alternates, and no Organization/WebSite JSON-LD sameAs entity graph.
asi.benchmark_issue: The first autoresearch.sh invocation timed out because the interactive check-site-meta UI did not terminate cleanly inside command substitution.
asi.next_action_hint: Fix autoresearch.sh to bound and clean up check-site-meta, then address branded descriptions, hreflang alternates, and JSON-LD.

description: Fix check-site-meta smoke so the SEO benchmark terminates cleanly and records readiness.

asi.hypothesis: Bounding the interactive npx check-site-meta UI will make the autoresearch loop usable while preserving the requested metadata preview tool.
asi.finding: check-site-meta boots successfully in agent mode and reports Ready; primary SEO findings remain 8 before product SEO changes.
asi.next_action_hint: Now reduce the 8 findings by adding branded localized descriptions, hreflang alternates, and Organization/WebSite JSON-LD.

description: Add localized brand SEO descriptions, home hreflang alternates, and Organization/WebSite JSON-LD.

asi.hypothesis: Strengthening brand/entity signals and hreflang coverage will eliminate the technical SEO findings most likely to affect direct GainForest search presentation.
asi.finding: The audit dropped from 8 findings to 0 after updating all localized root descriptions, adding language alternates to root metadata, and injecting translated Organization/WebSite JSON-LD with sameAs links.
asi.tradeoff: One non-blocking warning remains because the technical audit is clean and future experiments should target content depth, internal links, and Search Console data.
asi.next_action_hint: Validate TypeScript/i18n, then consider a second SEO experiment that adds richer crawlable internal links or page-specific metadata for important public pages.

description: Baseline localized public-page metadata audit with 12 gaps across Projects and Observations.

asi.hypothesis: After core technical SEO is clean, localized metadata for public listing pages is the next measurable SEO lever.
asi.finding: Projects and Observations currently have hardcoded or missing localized metadata; projects translations lack GainForest in descriptions, and observations metadata translations are absent across all locales.
asi.next_action_hint: Convert Projects and Observations pages to generateMetadata with next-intl, add brand-forward metadata translations for en/es/pt/sw/id, then rerun.

description: Localize Projects and Observations metadata with GainForest-forward titles and descriptions.

asi.hypothesis: Localized, brand-forward Metadata API values for high-value public listing pages improve index snippets and reinforce GainForest entity relevance beyond the home page.
asi.finding: public_metadata_gaps dropped from 12 to 0 by moving Projects and Observations to generateMetadata and adding en/es/pt/sw/id metadata translations that name GainForest.
asi.tradeoff: Metadata copy is intentionally plain and brand-forward, avoiding protocol jargon and keeping all configured languages in sync.
asi.next_action_hint: Run validation; then consider another SEO phase for sitemap breadth or dynamic project-page structured data.
